text.autoconfig.smart-auto-swap.title: Smart Auto Swap Config
text.autoconfig.smart-auto-swap.option.s: Whether to swap tools when you are destroying blocks in Creative Mode.
text.autoconfig.smart-auto-swap.option.p: Prevents the item in your offhand from being used when it's durability reaches a certain point.
Always selects the highest tier tool available (e.g., Netherite over Iron) when a block is attacked.
